description: ABEMA is a Japanese streaming television and video service operated by AbemaTV, Inc. The public site provides live channels and on-demand programming, with some geographic restrictions.
summary: ABEMA exposes an undocumented HTTP API at `https://api.abema.io`; some endpoints are publicly callable while others require an `Authorization` header, but no official developer documentation or credential issuance flow was found on `abema.tv`.
